title: Experts link suspected tunnels beneath Puri shrine to ancient mutts
description: Ground penetrating surveys near Puri Jagannath Temple revealed suspected tunnel-like structures, identified by historians as integral to ancient mutts. These underground networks likely served as drainage systems or passages for movement and protection of deities and royalty during invasions, with historical texts corroborating their existence.

title: Fossil fuel money funds climate lies. Then ‘AI slopaganda’ spreads it
description: Misinformation is not only undermining effective action on climate change, but the collateral damage includes community cohesion, political discourse and democracy itself.

title: Were PC gamers right to take against Syndicate's FPS reboot? Only one man with an ancient disc copy can find out
description: Imagine a world with ever-so-slightly fewer cyberpunk games. Welcome to 2012.
